title: UIUC-BioNLP @ BioCreative VIII BioRED Track
author: Sarol, M. Janina
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Abstract   In this paper, we present a pipeline approach for the BioCreative VIII BioRED (Biomedical Relation Extraction Dataset) Track. Our approach combines fine-tuned PubMedBERT models for named entity recognition (NER), relation extraction (RE), and novelty detection (ND), with an entity linking (EL) approach based on PubTator and BERN2 models. Our end-to-end system achieved competitive results, ranking above the average and the median scores for all submissions.     This article is part of the  Proceedings of the BioCreative VIII Challenge and Workshop: Curation and Evaluation in the era of Generative Models .
steps_raw: Abstract   In this paper, we present a pipeline approach for the BioCreative VIII BioRED (Biomedical Relation Extraction Dataset) Track. Our approach combines fine-tuned PubMedBERT models for named entity recognition (NER), relation extraction (RE), and novelty detection (ND), with an entity linking (EL) approach based on PubTator and BERN2 models. Our end-to-end system achieved competitive results, ranking above the average and the median scores for all submissions.     This article is part of the  Proceedings of the BioCreative VIII Challenge and Workshop: Curation and Evaluation in the era of Generative Models .
